agentHints.purpose: A fast visual memory game for a restaurant loyalty experience.
agentHints.imageRule: Use six or more square-ish food images from the merchant crawl. Every card needs an id, label, and image path.
agentHints.cssRule: Values in css are exposed directly as CSS custom properties. Keep high contrast between --ink and --paper.
agentHints.gameRule: The countdown is a loss condition. A round is won only after every pair is matched before timeLimitSeconds reaches zero. Score progress is displayed as current/scoreTarget.
agentHints.doNotChange: Keep card ids unique. The HTML duplicates and shuffles the cards automatically.

content.title: Pasta Pairing
content.intro: Turn over the menu, find every matching pair, and keep your moves deliciously low.
content.winMessage: You matched the full menu in {moves} moves and {time} seconds.
content.loseMessage: Time is up. You matched {pairs} of {total} menu pairs.
